title: JourneyMap Ore Heatmap
description: Visualize ore concentrations with color-coded heatmap overlays on JourneyMap. Automatically scans chunks and highlights ore-rich areas.
body:
# JourneyMap Ore Heatmap

Adds ore density heatmap overlays to JourneyMap. See at a glance where ores are concentrated across your world!

![Ore Heatmap Screenshot](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/StephanMeijer/journeymap-ore-heatmap/main/heatmap.png)

## Features

- **Heatmap visualization** - Chunks colored by ore density: light yellow (low) → orange (medium) → dark red (high)
- **Automatic scanning** - Chunks scanned in the background when loaded, no performance impact
- **Persistent cache** - Ore data saved per-world and persists between sessions
- **Easy toggle** - Press **O** or click the button in JourneyMap's fullscreen map
- **Mod support** - Uses `#c:ores` tag to automatically track ores from vanilla and modded content

## Usage

1. Install JourneyMap and this mod
2. Press **O** to toggle the heatmap overlay
3. Explore your world - chunks are scanned automatically
4. Check the map to find ore-rich areas!

## Configuration

Customize in `config/journeymap_ore_heatmap-client.toml`:
- Overlay opacity
- Update interval
- Custom ore tracking (tags or specific blocks)
